    All Classes and Interfaces

    Course
    Represents a university course with eligibility rules, instructors, students, and scheduled lessons.
    CourseAdminService
     
    CourseAlreadyRegisteredException
     
    CourseNameComparator
     
    CourseRegistration

    Employee
     
    EmployeeRequest
     
    EmployeeRequestService
    Handles submission, listing, signing, and rejection of employee requests.

    GradingService
     
    GraduateStudent
    Represents a graduate-level student with diploma project responsibilities.

    InMemoryRegistrationRepository
     
    InMemoryUserRepository
     
    Language
     
    Lesson

    LogService
     
    LowHIndexException

    Manager
    Represents a manager responsible for registration workflow, academic reporting, teacher assignment, and administrative sorting and analytics.
    ManagerMenu
     
    ManagerType
     
    Mark
     
    MasterStudent
     
    Message
     
    MessageService
     
    MessageStatus

    RegistrationException
     
    RegistrationRepository
     
    RegistrationService
    Handles course registration requests and approval workflow.
    RegistrationStatus
     
    ReportGenerationException
     
    ReportGenerator
    Generates aggregate reports about the university and student performance.
    ReportingService
     
    Researcher
    Describes research-related behavior shared by users who can participate in research activity.
    ResearcherCitationsComparator
     
    ResearchJournal
     
    ResearchMenuHelper
     
    ResearchPaper
     
    ResearchPaperCitationsComparator
     
    ResearchPaperDateComparator
     
    ResearchPaperPagesComparator
     
    ResearchProject
    Represents a research project with a topic, participants, and published papers.
    ResearchProjectException
     
    ResearchService
    Provides research-related application services such as paper management, project creation, journal subscription, and research analytics.
    SeniorLecturer
     
    SessionContext
     
    Student
    Represents a student who can enroll in courses, receive marks, calculate GPA, and optionally participate in research activity.
    StudentAlphabetComparator
     
    StudentGpaComparator
     
    StudentMenu
     
    StudentProfileService
    Handles student-specific profile actions such as researcher mode, supervisor assignment, diploma project setup, ratings, and course teacher lookup.
    Teacher
    Represents a teacher who can teach courses, grade students, receive ratings, and optionally participate in research.
    TeacherMenu
     
    TeacherRatingComparator
     
    TeacherTitle
     
    Transcript
     
    Tutor
     
    UniversitySystem
    Central in-memory model of the university.
    UrgencyLevel
     
    User
    Base abstract user of the university system.
    UserAdminService
     
    UserFactory
     
    UserNotFoundException
     
    UserRepository
     
    UserRole
